note: DEMO SCOPE: manufacturer offers localized to NY (ZIP 10005). cash/finance/lease only; no state purchase rebate. Per-trim offers under each vehicle's `trims`.

deals.description:
Customer Cash and Alternative APR
Available for:
Finance
Requirements and Restrictions:
$7,000

lucid-air-2026.note: Curated from Lucid Motors offers (2026 Air). 0% APR up to 60 mo on select models + up to ~$4,500 Lucid Credit when financing; cash purchases up to $5,000 Lucid Credit; advertised lease from $649/mo for 36 mo (~$6,139 due at signing, Air Pure). Conditional (not modeled in totals): $2,000 Conquest bonus, up to $4,000 trade-in allowance, 2 yr / 24k-mi complimentary maintenance.

lucid-gravity-2026.note: Curated from Lucid Motors offers (2026 Gravity). $7,500 Lucid Advantage Lease Credit (lease only — shown as lease cash, not in totals); 0% APR up to 60 mo on Gravity Touring; advertised lease from ~$799/mo (Touring, ~39 mo advertised; stored under 36 mo). Up to ~$12,500 stackable. Conditional (not modeled in totals): $2,000 Conquest bonus, up to $5,000 trade-in allowance, 2 yr / 24k-mi complimentary maintenance.
